Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to generate 20 open ended thought provoking questions based on the given pseudo BPMN representation of a multinational smartphone supply chain process

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The questions should delve deeper into rationale potential improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement We must not provide SQL queries just list the questions

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to create thought provoking questions that encourage analysis and discussion

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process is a supply chain for smartphones market research and RD securing components from various countries shipping to assembly in Malaysia assembling quality checks packaging distribution via air or sea customs clearance distribution centers then various distribution channels and finally monitoring inventory sales and adjusting orders or proceeding to next cycle

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We should craft questions about each stage but also cross cutting concerns risk management performance measurement stakeholder communication decision making potential improvements etc

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can think about typical supply chain issues global sourcing risks quality control lead times customs delays demand forecasting inventory management sustainability geopolitical factors technology choices process efficiency collaboration with suppliers etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets structure some about the overall process some about specific steps
